queries.sql: select count(*) as aggregate from `products` left join `attribute_families` as `af` on `products`.`attribute_family_id` = `af`.`id` inner join (select `product_id`, MIN(id) as base_image_id, COUNT(*) as images_count from `product_images` group by `product_id`) as `pi` on `pi`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join `product_images` as `base_img` on `base_img`.`id` = `pi`.`base_image_id` left join (select `product_id`, SUM(qty) as qty from `product_inventories` group by `product_id`) as `inv` on `inv`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`text_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'name' and (`pav`.`locale` is null or `pav`.`locale` = 'en')) as `pav_name` on `pav_name`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`float_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'price') as `pav_price` on `pav_price`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`boolean_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'status' and (`pav`.`channel` is null or `pav`.`channel` = 'default')) as `pav_status` on `pav_status`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`text_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'url_key' and (`pav`.`locale` is null or `pav`.`locale` = 'en')) as `pav_url` on `pav_url`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`boolean_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'visible_individually') as `pav_vis` on `pav_vis`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `product_id`, COUNT(*) as reviews_count, AVG(rating) as avg_rating from `product_reviews` group by `product_id`) as `rv` on `rv`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `product_id`, COUNT(*) as videos_count from `product_videos` group by `product_id`) as `vd` on `vd`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `product_id`, COUNT(DISTINCT channel_id) as channels_count from `product_channels` group by `product_id`) as `pchn` on `pchn`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pc`.`product_id`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ct.name SEPARATOR ", ") as names, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.category_id) as categories_count from `product_categories` as `pc` left join `category_translations` as `ct` on `pc`.`category_id` = `ct`.`category_id` and `ct`.`locale` = 'en' group by `pc`.`product_id`) as `cat` on `cat`.`product_id` = `products`.`id`

select 'en' as locale, 'default' as channel, `products`.`id` as `product_id`, `products`.`sku`, `products`.`type`, `products`.`created_at`, `products`.`updated_at`, `base_img`.`path` as `base_image`, `pi`.`images_count`, `pav_name`.`value` as `name`, `pav_price`.`value` as `price`, `pav_status`.`value` as `status`, `pav_url`.`value` as `url_key`, `pav_vis`.`value` as `visible_individually`, `af`.`name` as `attribute_family`, `inv`.`qty` as `quantity`, COALESCE(rv.reviews_count, 0) as reviews_count, ROUND(COALESCE(rv.avg_rating, 0), 2) as avg_rating, COALESCE(vd.videos_count, 0) as videos_count, COALESCE(pchn.channels_count, 0) as channels_count, `cat`.`names` as `category_name`, COALESCE(cat.categories_count, 0) as categories_count from `products` left join `attribute_families` as `af` on `products`.`attribute_family_id` = `af`.`id` inner join (select `product_id`, MIN(id) as base_image_id, COUNT(*) as images_count from `product_images` group by `product_id`) as `pi` on `pi`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join `product_images` as `base_img` on `base_img`.`id` = `pi`.`base_image_id` left join (select `product_id`, SUM(qty) as qty from `product_inventories` group by `product_id`) as `inv` on `inv`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`text_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'name' and (`pav`.`locale` is null or `pav`.`locale` = 'en')) as `pav_name` on `pav_name`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`float_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'price') as `pav_price` on `pav_price`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`boolean_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'status' and (`pav`.`channel` is null or `pav`.`channel` = 'default')) as `pav_status` on `pav_status`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`text_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'url_key' and (`pav`.`locale` is null or `pav`.`locale` = 'en')) as `pav_url` on `pav_url`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pav`.`product_id`, `pav`.`boolean_value` as `value` from `product_attribute_values` as `pav` inner join `attributes` as `a` on `pav`.`attribute_id` = `a`.`id` where `a`.`code` = 'visible_individually') as `pav_vis` on `pav_vis`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `product_id`, COUNT(*) as reviews_count, AVG(rating) as avg_rating from `product_reviews` group by `product_id`) as `rv` on `rv`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `product_id`, COUNT(*) as videos_count from `product_videos` group by `product_id`) as `vd` on `vd`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `product_id`, COUNT(DISTINCT channel_id) as channels_count from `product_channels` group by `product_id`) as `pchn` on `pchn`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` left join (select `pc`.`product_id`, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ct.name SEPARATOR ", ") as names, COUNT(DISTINCT pc.category_id) as categories_count from `product_categories` as `pc` left join `category_translations` as `ct` on `pc`.`category_id` = `ct`.`category_id` and `ct`.`locale` = 'en' group by `pc`.`product_id`) as `cat` on `cat`.`product_id` = `products`.`id` order by `product_id` desc limit 10 offset 0
